7 //#include "arcane/geometry/ItemGroupMap.h"
8 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ItemGroupMap.h"
9 
10 #include "arcane/IMesh.h"
11 #include "arcane/utils/ItemGroupObserver.h"
12 #include "arcane/utils/OStringStream.h"
13 #include "arcane/ItemPrinter.h"
14 #include "arcane/ArcaneException.h"
15 #include "arcane/utils/IStackTraceService.h"
16 #include "arcane/utils/PlatformUtils.h"
17 #include "arcane/ISubDomain.h"
18 
19 using namespace Arcane;
20 
21 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
22 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
23 
24 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
25 ItemGroupMapAbstract()
26  : HashTableBase(0,false)
27  , m_group(ItemGroupImpl::checkSharedNull())
28  , m_properties(0)
29  , m_is_valid(false)
30 {
31  IStackTraceService * stacktrace = platform::getStackTraceService();
32  if (stacktrace)
33  m_stacktrace = stacktrace->stackTrace().toString();
34 }
35 
36 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
37 
38 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
39 ~ItemGroupMapAbstract()
40 {
41  if (not m_group->null())
42  {
43  m_group->detachObserver(this);
44  }
45 }
46 
47 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
48 
49 void
50 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
51 _init(const ItemGroup & group)
52 {
53  if (m_group != group.internal()) {
54  _updateObservers(group.internal());
55  }
56 
57  if (not m_stacktrace.empty() and traceMng() != NULL)
58  {
59  Trace::Setter traceSetter(traceMng(),"ItemGroupMap");
60  traceMng()->debug(Trace::Highest)
61  << "ItemGroupMapAbstract ctor stack trace reminder:\n"
62  << m_stacktrace;
63  }
64 
65  const Integer group_size = group.size();
66  m_nb_bucket = this->nearestPrimeNumber(2*group_size);
67  m_buckets.resize(m_nb_bucket);
68  m_buckets.fill(-1);
69  m_key_buffer.resize(group_size);
70  m_next_buffer.resize(group_size);
71 
72  for(ItemEnumerator i(group.enumerator()) ; i.hasNext(); ++i)
73  {
74  const KeyTypeConstRef key = i.itemLocalId();
75  const Integer bucket = _hash(key);
76 #ifdef ARCANE_DEBUG_ASSERT
77  const Integer lookup = _lookupBucket(bucket,key);
78 #endif
79  ARCANE_ASSERT( (lookup < 0), ("Already assigned key"));
80  m_key_buffer[i.index()] = key;
81  m_next_buffer[i.index()] = m_buckets[bucket];
82  m_buckets[bucket] = i.index();
83  }
84  m_is_valid = true ;
85 }
86 
87 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
88 
89 void
90 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
91 _updateObservers(ItemGroupImpl * group)
92 {
93  if (not m_group->null())
94  {
95  m_group->detachObserver(this);
96  }
97 
98  if (group)
99  m_group = group;
100 
101  m_group->attachObserver(this,newItemGroupObserverT(this,
102  &ItemGroupMapAbstract::_executeInvalidate));
103 }
104 
105 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
106 
107 void
108 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
109 _executeInvalidate()
110 {
111  m_is_valid = false ;
112 }
113 
114 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
115 
116 void
117 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
118 setProperties(const Integer property)
119 {
120  m_properties |= property;
121  _updateObservers();
122 }
123 
124 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
125 
126 void
127 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
128 unsetProperties(const Integer property)
129 {
130  m_properties &= ~property;
131  _updateObservers();
132 }
133 
134 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
135 
136 ITraceMng *
137 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
138 traceMng() const
139 {
140  if (!m_group->null())
141  return m_group->mesh()->traceMng();
142  return NULL;
143 }
144 
145 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
146 
147 bool
148 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
149 checkSameGroup(const ItemGroup & group) const
150 {
151  _checkGroupIntegrity();
152  if (group.internal() == m_group)
153  return true;
154  if (group.size() != m_group->size() ||
155  group.itemKind() != m_group->itemKind() ||
156  group.itemFamily() != m_group->itemFamily())
157  return false;
158  // Ici test sur les items mais meme taille, meme type, meme famille
159  // On se fie aux ItemInternal's (meme les localIds peuvent suffir)
160  const ItemInternalArrayView orgItems = m_group->itemsInternal();
161  const ItemInternalArrayView testItems = group.internal()->itemsInternal();
162  const Integer size = orgItems.size();
163  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
164  if (orgItems[i] != testItems[i])
165  return false;
166  return true;
167 }
168 
169 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
170 
171 bool
172 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
173 checkSameGroup(const ItemVectorView & group) const
174 {
175  _checkGroupIntegrity();
176  if (group.size() != m_group->size()) {
177  traceMng()->fatal() << "Bad sizes";
178  return false;
179  }
180  // Ici test sur les items mais meme taille
181  // On se fie donc aux ItemInternal's
182  const ItemInternalArrayView orgItems = m_group->itemsInternal();
183  const ItemInternalArrayView testItems = group.items();
184  const Integer size = orgItems.size();
185  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
186  if (orgItems[i] != testItems[i]) {
187  traceMng()->fatal() << "Item " << i << " don't match : " << orgItems[i] << " vs " << testItems[i];
188  return false;
189  }
190  return true;
191 }
192 
193 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
194 
195 String
196 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
197 name() const
198 {
199  OStringStream oss;
200  oss() << "ItemGroupMap(" << this << ") on " << group().name();
201  return oss.str();
202 }
203 
204 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
205 
206 bool
207 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
208 _checkGroupIntegrity() const {
209  bool integrity = true;
210  if (group().size() != m_key_buffer.size()) {
211  traceMng()->fatal() << "ItemGroupMap BAD DATA size : group size=" << group().size() << " vs data size=" << m_key_buffer.size();
212  integrity = false;
213  }
214 
215  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,group()) {
216  const Integer hd = iitem.index();
217  if (m_key_buffer[hd] != iitem.localId() || !_hasKey(iitem.localId())) {
218  traceMng()->fatal() << "ItemGroupMap BAD DATA at " << iitem.index() << " : lid=" << iitem.localId() << " vs key " << m_key_buffer[hd] << " chk:" << _hasKey(iitem.localId());
219  integrity = false;
220  }
221  }
222  return integrity;
223 }
224 
225 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
226 
227 Integer
228 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
229 _hash(KeyTypeConstRef id) const
230 {
231  ARCANE_ASSERT((_initialized()),("ItemGroupMap not initialized"));
232  return (Integer)(KeyTraitsType::hashFunction(id) % m_nb_bucket);
233 }
234 
235 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
236 
237 bool
238 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
239 _hasKey(KeyTypeConstRef id) const
240 {
241  const Integer hf = _hash(id);
242  for( Integer i = m_buckets[hf]; i>=0 ; i=m_next_buffer[i] )
243  {
244  if (m_key_buffer[i]==id)
245  return true;
246  }
247  return false;
248 }
249 
250 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
251 
252 Integer
253 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
254 _lookupBucket(Integer bucket, KeyTypeConstRef id) const
255 {
256  ARCANE_ASSERT((_initialized()),("ItemGroupMap not initialized"));
257  for( Integer i=m_buckets[bucket]; i>=0 ; i=m_next_buffer[i] )
258  {
259  if (m_key_buffer[i]==id)
260  return i;
261  }
262  return -1;
263 }
264 
265 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
266 
267 Integer
268 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
269 _lookup(KeyTypeConstRef id) const
270 {
271  return _lookupBucket(_hash(id),id);
272 }
273 
274 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
275 
276 bool
277 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
278 _initialized() const
279 {
280  return not m_buckets.empty();
281 }
282 
283 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
284 
285 void
286 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
287 _throwItemNotFound(const TraceInfo & info, const Item & item) const throw()
288 {
289  OStringStream oss;
290  oss() << "Cannot find ItemGroupMap key " << ItemPrinter(item) << " for group " << group().name();
291  throw InternalErrorException(info,oss.str());
292 }
293 
294 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
295 
296 void
297 ItemGroupMapAbstract::
298 stats(std::ostream & o)
299 {
300  Integer collision_count = 0;
301  SharedArray<bool> key_done(m_key_buffer.size());
302  key_done.fill(false);
303  for(Integer i=0; i<m_key_buffer.size() && !key_done[i] ; ++i)
304  {
305  for(Integer hd = i; m_next_buffer[hd]>=0 ; hd = m_next_buffer[hd])
306  {
307  key_done[hd] = true;
308  o << "Collision in bucket " << i << " / " << m_nb_bucket << " between : "
309  << m_key_buffer[hd] << "(" << KeyTraitsType::hashFunction(m_key_buffer[hd]) << ") and "
310  << m_next_buffer[m_key_buffer[hd]] << "(" << KeyTraitsType::hashFunction(m_next_buffer[m_key_buffer[hd]]) << ")\n";
311  ++collision_count;
312  }
313  }
314  o << "ItemGroupMapAbstractT::stats : Collision count = " << collision_count << " / " << m_key_buffer.size() << "\n";
315 }
